message:
test(conformance): add EXPIREAT/PEXPIREAT invalid integer cases

Add conformance tests for non-canonical integer rejection:
- EXPIREAT with leading plus (+100), leading zeros (0100), non-numeric,
  float, and empty string
- PEXPIREAT with same invalid patterns
- EXPIRE/PEXPIRE with leading plus and leading zeros

Closes frankenredis-vfgb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2122,6 +2122,188 @@

     },
